title: Author a weighted canary route with subsets
description: Write the DestinationRule subsets and VirtualService weighted routes for a canary, then verify the split with per-subset metrics.
body: Use when you must split traffic between a stable and canary version. Do not route to a subset before its DestinationRule defines it. Actions: define stable and canary subsets in a DestinationRule keyed on the version label, write a VirtualService with two route destinations carrying the desired weights, keep the host as the service FQDN, and apply with a small initial canary weight. Validation signals include per-subset request metrics matching the configured ratio and a header-based match (if used) reaching the canary. Risk boundary: increasing canary weight on production traffic is a release step; cutover to full traffic is human-gated.
